_style: 儿童 App UI 素材, painterly children book illustration, 温暖配色（赭石、琥珀、柔和粉橙）, 柔和阴影, ⚠️纯白色背景 pure white background, 居中构图, 完整剧情场景, 横向构图（4:3），无任何文字
_note: time_start/time_end 取自 e02_auto.en-orig.vtt 词级时间戳，对齐 source_e02.mp4，供 cut_clips 切原片。

sentences.text: Mr Dinosaur is George's favorite toy.
sentences.meaning_zh: 恐龙先生是George最爱的玩具。
sentences.subject: a baby boy piglet cuddling a small green toy dinosaur lovingly in a cozy living room, the dinosaur is the focus, warm family home background

sentences.text: Sometimes George likes to scare Peppa with Mr Dinosaur.
sentences.subject: a baby boy piglet thrusting a green toy dinosaur toward a girl piglet who jumps back startled with wide eyes, playful living room scene, a small shock burst between them

sentences.text: Good night George, and good night Mr Dinosaur.
sentences.subject: a baby piglet asleep in a small bed hugging a green dinosaur toy under a blanket, a window showing a crescent moon and stars, soft warm bedside lamp glow

sentences.text: George's favorite game is throwing Mr Dinosaur up in the air.
sentences.meaning_zh: George最爱的游戏是把恐龙抛向空中。
sentences.subject: a baby boy piglet in a garden tossing a small green dinosaur toy high up into the blue sky with both arms, the toy near the top of the frame, upward motion arc

sentences.text: And catching him when he falls back down.
sentences.meaning_zh: 等它掉下来的时候再接住。
sentences.subject: a baby boy piglet in a garden reaching both arms up to catch a small green dinosaur toy dropping from the sky, downward motion lines, the catch about to happen
a crying baby boy piglet with empty open hands and big tears, a girl piglet and father pig looking concerned beside him, a faint missing-dinosaur outline with a question mark

sentences.text: Don't worry George, we'll find Mr Dinosaur.
sentences.meaning_zh: 别担心George，我们会找到恐龙的。
sentences.subject: a kind father pig kneeling with a reassuring hand on a small crying piglet's shoulder, a girl piglet holding a magnifying glass ready to help, comforting warm mood

sentences.text: It's a job for a detective.
sentences.subject: a girl piglet putting on a brown deerstalker detective hat and holding up a magnifying glass with a confident clever smile, a spotlight on her

sentences.text: A detective is a person who is good at finding things.
sentences.meaning_zh: 侦探就是擅长找东西的人。
sentences.subject: a girl piglet detective with a magnifying glass happily discovering hidden objects scattered on the ground, sparkles of discovery, clever proud expression
a girl piglet with one finger pointing up and a bright glowing lightbulb above her head, sudden confident idea, knowing smile

sentences.text: Mr Dinosaur is not in the bath.
sentences.subject: a white bathtub full of bubbles with a rubber duck but clearly no dinosaur, a girl piglet detective peering in with a magnifying glass looking puzzled

sentences.text: Maybe we should try the garden.
sentences.meaning_zh: 也许我们该去花园找找。
sentences.subject: a father pig pointing toward a sunny green garden with flowers and a tree while a girl piglet detective looks that way with interest, hopeful searching mood

sentences.text: There he is! I saw him first.
sentences.subject: a girl piglet pointing up excitedly at a small green dinosaur toy caught high in the leafy branches of a tree, bright sky, triumphant discovery

sentences.text: Well done Peppa, you really are a very good detective.
sentences.meaning_zh: 干得好Peppa，你真是个好侦探。
sentences.subject: a father pig giving a proud thumbs up to a beaming girl piglet wearing a detective hat and holding a magnifying glass, sparkles of praise around them

sentences.text: George is so happy to have Mr Dinosaur back again.
sentences.subject: a baby boy piglet beaming with pure joy hugging a small green dinosaur toy tightly to his chest, hearts and sparkles bursting around, sunny garden background
